data.title: Sungrow Unveils SG125CX-P3 C&I Inverter at Solar & Storage Live Africa 2026
data.description: In Johannesburg on March 27, 2026, Sungrow introduced the SG125CX-P3 at Solar & Storage Live Africa 2026, marking a milestone in the realm of commercial and industrial (C&I) energy solutions. This 125 kW string inverter is part of Sungrow's innovative C&I inverter platform, designed to cater to the changing requirements of solar projects with cutting-edge technology. The SG125CX-P3 aims to enhance efficiency and performance in the C&I sector, taking strides towards a more sustainable energy landscape.

data.title: TRX price aims $0.35 resistance test by early April 2026, currently at $0.32 with neutral momentum. Support level critical.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON is currently trading at $0.32, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 66.67 indicating a neutral momentum. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of TRON testing the $0.35 resistance level within the next 2-3 weeks if the current support remains intact.

data.title: Global Time and Attendance Software Market to Reach USD 6.32 Billion by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 7.35%, Reports MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: On March 27, 2026, a recent market research report from MarkNtel Advisors revealed that the Global Time and Attendance Software Market is estimated to experience a growth rate of approximately 7.35% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is attributed to factors such as the rising demand for efficient workforce management solutions.

data.title: Global Ride Gear Market to Reach USD 11.36 Billion by 2032, Expanding at a CAGR of 11.27% | Vyansa Intelligence
data.description: As per a recent market study by Vyansa Intelligence, the worldwide Ride Gear Market is forecasted to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 11.27% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is mainly attributed to the increasing emphasis on rider safety.

data.title: ATOM expects to hit $1.95 by April 2026. Short-term target is $1.76 with critical support at $1.65.
data.description: ATOM's price is expected to reach $1.76 in the short term and could range between $1.85 to $1.95 within a month. A bullish breakout is anticipated at $1.96, while a critical support level is identified at $1.65. These predictions come from a recent analysis of the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Litecoin trades at $54.95, neutral RSI at 47.92. Predicts $57-$58 breakout, but bears eye $52-$53 support.
data.description: The current trading price of Litecoin stands at $54.95, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 47.92. Analysts predict a potential uptick to the $57-$58 resistance range based on technical analysis. However, bears are eyeing the $52-$53 support levels in the short term.

data.title: By April 2026, BCH is forecasted to consolidate at $475-485. Short-term target is $475-485 with critical support at $452.
data.description: Summary of BCH Price Predictions: The short-term target within one week is estimated to be in the range of $475-$485, while the medium-term forecast for the next month is expected to fall between $450-$490. A bullish breakout level of $484 is identified, with a critical support level set at $452.

data.title: EP YAYING Concludes a Successful Debut at Shanghai Fashion Week MODE, Presenting Immersive Eastern Aesthetics on the Global Fashion Stage
data.description: A prominent Chinese luxury fashion label, EP YAYING, recently wrapped up its first appearance at MODE during Shanghai Fashion Week 2026. The brand unveiled a sneak peek of its Autumn/Winter 2026 collection on March 25, garnering attention from top international attendees.
